summary_line: PA-based mid-large fee-only RIA — $1.59B AUM, 24 employees, 15 advisors, 0 DRPs. Tagline: 'Live freely.' Site IA: Mission · People · Process · Services · Guide for Good · Insights. 'Holistic and comprehensive' framing. Content-engine ('Insights' nav item). NOTE: site home meta description is the default WordPress placeholder text ('This is an example page. It's different from a blog post...') — the firm forgot to set their site meta. Quality marker: above the size class of USWM's direct comparables, useful as a 'what mid-large local RIA looks like' benchmark.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 166418 — 24 employees, 15 advisors, $1,586,830,325 regulatory AUM (~$106M per advisor), 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'COMPASS ION ADVISORS, LLC.'

Site capture: 5 pages (home, mission, blog, contact, services). Hero H1: 'Live freely.' Site IA: Mission · People · Process · Services · Guide for Good · Insights · Talk with an Advisor. Phone: 877.799.6830. Positioning: 'Living freely can be simple' / 'Let us help you find your financial direction.' Mission page reframes 'Living freely' as core promise. **DATA-QUALITY NOTE**: homepage og_description is the WordPress default placeholder ('This is an example page. It's different from a blog post... I'm a bike messenger by day...') — they shipped the site without setting meta. Doesn't affect their business but is a real signal about marketing-ops maturity for a $1.59B AUM firm.
